title: The Slaying of Qutaybah b. Muslim
description: The circumstances surrounding this: Al-Walid b. 'Abd al-Malik wanted to designate his son, 'Abd al-'Aziz b. al-Walid, as the heir apparent, and he secretly conveyed his intent to the generals and the poets.13 Jaflr14 said with regard to this: When they ask, "Which man would be the best Caliph?" the fingers point to 'Abd al-'Aziz.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 24
